scripts.build: npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm install --prefix server --include=dev && cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://dummy:dummy@localhost/dummy npx prisma generate && npx tsc
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/index.js
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
